findings.description: Footnote stating that this feature does NOT provide login processing business logic, and projects must create their own, is omitted. Source footnote: 「本機能では、ログイン処理を実行する業務処理は提供しない。Nablarch導入プロジェクトにて、要件に応じてログイン処理を作成すること。」 The knowledge file only says the sample is intended to be used within login processing, but does not explicitly state it is the project's responsibility to create the login processing itself.
findings.source_evidence:
.. [#auth_action]

  本機能では、ログイン処理を実行する業務処理は提供しない。
  Nablarch導入プロジェクトにて、要件に応じてログイン処理を作成すること。

findings.location: s3 (構成) — 例外クラス: AuthenticationException
findings.description: The AuthenticationException description omits an important behavioral constraint: that the class and its subclasses hold the information needed to create user-facing messages, but do NOT create messages themselves. This affects how developers must handle message creation when catching these exceptions.
findings.source_evidence:
本クラス及びサブクラスでは、ユーザへ提示するメッセージの作成に
必要な情報を保持し、メッセージの作成は行わない。

findings.description: The source 使用方法 h2 section is well over 2000 characters and contains two h3 subsections (PasswordAuthenticatorの使用方法, AuthenticaionUtilの使用方法) plus an h4 subsection (AuthenticationUtilの使用例), but all content is merged into single section s4 without splitting.

Hints for s4 are missing class names referenced in the configuration XML example: `SimpleDbTransactionManager`, `BasicSystemTimeProvider`, `BasicBusinessDateProvider`. These are concrete implementation classes users may search for when configuring PasswordAuthenticator.
